task_description: fetch the latest release version of neovim from GitHub

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Fetching latest release version of neovim from GitHub..."
curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/neovim/neovim/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name":' | sed -E 's/.*"([^"]+)".*/\1/'
```
